caption:
Comment “FEEL” to get the full BRAND SYSTEM and every prompts I used ⬇️🔥

AI brands all look the same. Clean. Polished. Soulless.

The ones that connect? They feel handmade.

3 prompts. 3 steps. 1 complete brand identity :

1 — Define your brand’s emotional DNA with one LLM prompt, I used @claudeai for this one.

2 — Translate it into a full visual direction with my prompt 🔥

3 — Generate every asset with texture keywords that make AI feel human. Use Nano Banana or Recraft for motion design !

Brand structure. Visual direction. Texture keywords. That’s the system.

Comment FEEL to get it all 🔥

#emotionalbranding #aibranding #aicreative
